content.en:
Ye Tian naturally wouldn't go directly to the Yuan Gu Hall with the fourth deity, otherwise, once he got close to the Yuan Gu Hall and was directly killed by the Yuan Gu Lord, wouldn't it be a heavy loss!

The current combat power of the fourth deity is only a third-class supreme, although it is a clone cultivated by the defensive supreme treasure and has remarkable results in defense, but it still can't block the blow of the first-class supreme.

Therefore, Ye Tian was going to approach the Yuan Gu Hall with an incarnation first.

In a star field close to the Yuangu Palace, Ye Tian stopped, and immediately descended on the Yuangu Hall in the form of an incarnation.

Outside the Yuangu Palace.

Ye Tian said: "I am an ancient temple, I have information about the reincarnation and talk to the Lord of the Yuan Gu!"

Ye Tian's transmission directly entered the Yuangu Hall in the way of divine consciousness and entered the Yuangu Palace, although it was intercepted, some of the supremes of the Yuangu Hall still heard it, and it quickly reached the ears of the Lord of Yuangu.

Inside the Yuangu Palace.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu looked through the layers of void and looked at Ye Tian's incarnation.

"An incarnation of a third-class supreme!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu frowned.

Such a weak supreme came to see him, if it was usual, he would not have met at all, but the other party said that there was information about the reincarnated person, and this meaning was different.

"Forget it, let's meet!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu thought to himself.

So, he said, "Come in!"

Ye Tian heard the transmission of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and entered the Yuan Gu Hall as an incarnation.

Just the incarnation, the loss doesn't matter, and when you enter the Yuangu Palace, the incarnation is the same as the fourth deity, and you can't resist the Lord of the Yuangu, so it doesn't make much difference whether you enter the real body or not.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Yuangu Hall and met many supremes of the Yuangu Palace, the leader of which was naturally the Lord of the Yuangu.

"I've seen the Lord of the Yuangu!"

Ye Tian greeted the Tao.

"Who are you?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"I'm from Chaos, and I spread the information of the last reincarnation!"

Ye Tian said directly.

"What! you spread it!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu was shocked.

But soon, the Lord of the Yuan Gu frowned again: "No, the breath is not you, you must lie to me!"

Then.

Ye Tian directly took out a weapon, which was a weapon on the second deity, and there was a wisp of breath on the second deity.

"It's just one of our members who spreads the news, this is one of his weapons, it has his breath on it, with the strength of the Lord of the Ancient Ages, it should be able to tell!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu probed carefully and sensed the breath on the weapon, which was really the breath of the person who spread the news in the first place, exactly the same.

At this moment, the Lord of the Yuan Gu has basically been affirmed.

The person in front of him is definitely in the same league as the person who spread the news.

"Okay, you said you're from Chaos, could it be the Hidden God Organization?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said coldly.

"Of course not!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "If it is the Tibetan God Organization, how can I spread the news." In fact, we only noticed a force in this universe, and because it was very far away from this universe, it was difficult to get into this universe, so we did not send a few people into this universe. As rumored, the Dual Universe Detachment is the arm of the Tibetan God Organization, and many members of the Tibetan God Organization have entered this universe and are now rapidly recovering their strength. Once they have stepped into the Supreme Level, you first-class Supremes, the Lord of the Ancient Ages, are far from being opponents. Among those members of the Hidden God Organization, some of the reincarnated ones were second only to the Heavenly Mandate Realm in terms of peak combat power! And the first-class supreme was too far away from the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and could dominate within the universe, but it was very ordinary in the chaos!"

Seeing Ye Tian belittle the first-class supreme like this, the Lord of the Yuan Gu was a little annoyed in his heart, but he couldn't get angry, so he couldn't figure out Ye Tian's identity.

Moreover, Ye Tian had a lot of information that he didn't understand, and he had to figure it out.

"Gushu, what are you doing here?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"Deal!" Ye Tian said seriously: "I am only here to trade, the chaos is vast, and the resources are innumerable, but there are some things in the universe that are also needed by the strong in the chaos, and the organization I am in cannot plan this universe, so I just want to collect some good things in this universe, and I don't want to participate." "

"Oh, what do you want?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"Innate Origin Thing!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Innate Origin !!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu had solemn eyes, this was a good thing, even he wanted it.

"I do have the Innate Origin Thing in my hand, but what do you trade it for? As far as I know, you reincarnated people come in, but you don't have any treasures to carry, right?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu smiled.

"Hahaha, Lord of the Progenitals, it's not difficult to send something in from the chaos, it's difficult to bring things out of the universe. You have fought with the reincarnated, the treasures on their bodies are endless, how they were brought in, don't you know? There are also many relics from the chaos in the universe, and I don't need to talk about these!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu did not refute and continued: "I am not interested in ordinary things, what can you come up with?"

"Regarding the information of the reincarnated person, I have more information, in addition, I also have the secret techniques from the chaos and a large number of chaos spirit treasures, although the innate origin thing is precious, but in fact it is not priceless for the first-class supremes, the first-class supreme has almost reached the peak realm, it is almost difficult to improve, and it can even be said that it is impossible to progress anymore, if it cannot be improved anymore, the innate origin thing is not of much use to the lord of the ancient age, am I right?" Ye Tian said.

"You're not afraid that I'll kill you and take away your resources and inheritance?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu tapped the handle on the throne with his right hand, staring at Ye Tian with murderous intent, and said.

"Don't be afraid!" Ye Tian smiled slightly, "Because you can't find my true figure, my current true body is just a clone!"

"Doppelganger?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was stunned.

Immediately, he cast a secret technique and instantly sensed the fourth deity in a star field in the distance through Ye Tian's avatar.

"It's really a doppelganger!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu is dignified.

The doppelganger looks the same as the main body, but it has one obvious feature, that is, the origin is not perfect!

There is no chance of detachment from such imperfect origins, only the essence can be transcended, and there is no way to observe the soul imprint of the other party in the long river of time and space through the doppelganger.

Ordinary people can't see the difference between a doppelganger and a deity, but how can the Lord of the Yuangu, who is a first-class supreme, not be able to see it.

"Deduction!"

The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty tried to deduce the location of Ye Tian's body, but Ye Tian's body was covered by the Heaven Covering Stone, and unless it was the Heavenly Mandate Realm's attack, it could not be detected at all.

"Can't find it!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu is dignified.

Although it has long been speculated, there is a glimmer of hope that his disappearance remains.

"At the beginning, the Supreme of Cause and Effect couldn't detect a trace of cause and effect, and I naturally couldn't detect my fate, so no wonder I dared to send a clone to trade with me!"

"The value of an innate origin thing, you should be very clear, although intelligence is valuable, but it doesn't help much to improve your strength! As for the value of the Chaos Spirit Treasure, that's it, it's not that I don't have the Chaos Spirit Treasure in my hands. And the cultivation method in the chaos, I also have a little bit in my hand, if the cultivation method in your hand is ordinary, then it can't attract me!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

He didn't want to suffer, so he wouldn't easily take out the things of his innate origin.

Ye Tian stared at the Lord of the Yuan Gu, his eyes narrowed, and he sneered in his heart: "Sure enough, he is worthy of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, it is not easy to fool the innate origin things on his body." "

After thinking about it in his mind, Ye Tian said again: "In this way, let's only trade one innate origin thing first, if it is suitable for both parties, I will take out a more precious thing." To show my sincerity, how about I send a piece of information for free?"

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu agreed.

Although an innate origin thing is precious, he can still afford to lose it.

"I'll trade the lowest value innate light source first, I wonder if the Lord of the Yuan Gu has it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Innate light source? It is indeed a low-level innate origin thing with very low value, but I don't have it in my hand, but other supreme beings have it in their hands, I can trade it, you should tell me about your free information!"

"Okay!" Ye Tian nodded, and continued: "Aren't the Supremes very strange why these reincarnated ones are so difficult to find, and they often disappear after being chased halfway through?"

"That's right!" The Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded: "I found a reincarnated person before, and I rushed over it myself, but the reincarnated person quickly disappeared, otherwise with my speed, he would not be able to escape!"

"I know the reason!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "Every reincarnation has mastered at least one secret realm, these secret realms are built by the high-level of the Tibetan God Organization, even the first-class supreme can't sense it at all, only the reincarnated can master the way to enter and exit, the secret realm contains a large number of treasures, such as their commonly used charms, and even amazing inheritances and so on." If you find the location of the secret realm and wait for the rabbit, you may be able to directly catch a reincarnated person!

"Hahaha, the Taoist friends of the ancient temple are really very sincere!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu laughed.

This information is too valuable, with this information, if you find the reincarnated person in the future, at least you can hope to find out the location of the secret realm, and then wait for the rabbit to capture a reincarnated person.

Of course, there is only hope, but not great hope.

But in any case, it's much better than blindly chasing and killing before.

Next, Ye Tian talked to the Lord of the Yuan Gu about the transaction of the innate light source.

In the end, Ye Tian paid for the inheritance of the thirty-two Chaos Sects, six Chaos Spirit Treasures, and a large number of rare resources to obtain the trading qualifications.

But the final transaction will have to wait for some time, because the innate light source is not in the hands of the Lord of the Yuangu.
